failure_asset.hypothesis_tested: fold-local train-only market-state archetype membership with abstention-first US100 M5 schedule replay
failure_asset.next_boundary: next C0004 work must change a meaningful state-archetype, feature, label, model, or trade-shape surface; do not retry R0001 by only nudging top archetype count, min archetype count, daily max entries, stop, target, hold, or session thresholds
failure_asset.reason_not_candidate: fold-isolated MT5 tick evidence completed with 8 losing folds, 1 profitable fold, negative total tick net PnL, and negative proxy PnL despite entries per active day inside the 5 to 10 target range

supporting_lessons.summary: Closed-bar schedule replay parity passed, but tick execution worsened total net PnL by 20.20 versus logic and changed total trade count by -3; tick execution remains the economic surface.
Fold-local state archetypes achieved target activity at 5.602763 entries per active day, but did not create profitable fold-isolated MT5 tick evidence.

hypothesis_variant.summary: test whether train-fold-local market-state archetypes can produce abstention-first US100 M5 entry events with enough activity for the 5 to 10 entries-per-active-day target before MT5 schedule replay
hypothesis_variant.variant_boundary: first C0004 true variant; changes model, feature, label, and trade-logic surfaces toward fold-local state archetype membership and abstention-first entry generation, not a threshold, window, SLTP, hold, or retry nudge from prior C0001 through SC0001 failures

notes: closed-bar MT5 mode is required for proxy-vs-EA logic parity
tick-mode MT5 is required for execution KPI management
fold-isolated MT5 tick and execution divergence are required before closeout
weak proxy evidence cannot skip MT5 validation
proxy must derive archetype, edge, and abstention rules only inside each rolling train window
proxy must report entry frequency, direction profile, fold activity, and state-archetype diagnostics without creating selected claims
proxy result cannot decide whether MT5 is attempted
mechanical parity must compare scheduled entries, directions, exits, exit reasons, and position lifecycle behavior
tick-vs-closed-bar differences are execution divergence, not automatic logic failure
repair mechanical parity before any hypothesis judgment when mismatch is found

feature.summary: train-fold-local closed-bar state features for volatility regime, trend slope, compression, expansion, gap state, session phase, recent path stability, and range position; no feature set is selected

label.summary: train-fold-local forward state-quality labels for directional excursion, adverse excursion, path stability, time-to-opportunity, and abstention quality; no label is selected

model.summary: unrestricted fold-local archetype membership and edge-estimation surface using rules, clustering, ranking, classifiers, or ensembles; no model family, objective, threshold, or score surface is selected

trade_logic.summary: fixed-lot discovery schedule that only enters when fold-local archetype evidence clears abstention-first activity controls, then uses simple initial exit semantics for MT5 schedule replay
